programme.desc: Six-time Grand Slam champion Iga Swiatek faces Jasmine Paolini for the Cincinnati title. In what will be Swiatek's 13th WTA 1000 final, Paolini is competing in just her third. (18.08)

programme.title: ATP Finals: Turin Final
programme.desc: World number one Carlos Alcaraz faces Italy's reigning ATP Finals champion Jannik Sinner in their sixth meeting of the year, marking the finale to the 2025 Tour season in Turin. (16.11)

programme.title: WTA Finals
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned at the WTA Finals in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. (08.11)

programme.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Britain's Jack Draper competes in his maiden ATP Masters 1000 final at Indian Wells as the top-10 bound Brit faces Holger Rune. Draper knocked out Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (16.03)

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: Jelena Ostapenko's near seven-year wait to vie for a WTA 1000 title ends in Doha, as the former Grand Slam champion faces 23-year-old American Amanda Anisimova in an unseeded final. (15.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned in Dubai. Mirra Andreeva - the youngest-ever WTA finalist - and Denmark's Clara Tauson face off for glory. (22.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Chasing a sixth ATP 1000 title and a first in Monte-Carlo, 21-year-old Spaniard Carlos Alcaraz competes in a blockbuster clash with first-time Masters finalist Lorenzo Musetti. (13.04)

programme.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Mirra Andreeva meets top seed Aryna Sabalenka in the Indian Wells final. Sabalenka avenged her Australian Open defeat to Keys in the semis, while Andreeva dethroned Swiatek. (16.03)

programme.desc: Suspicion: US crime drama. The team investigate the murder of a marine intelligence officer found in a hotel room, with local police suspecting an Iraqi resident is responsible.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: US crime drama series. When a sailor's body is discovered in an abandoned part of town, a drugs overdose seems the likely cause of death. But all is not as it seems.

programme.desc: A young woman accuses a celebrity plastic surgeon and his girlfriend of sexual assault. Benson and the team must decide if she was attacked, or if a sex game went awry.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Crime drama series following an elite squad of detectives. The team investigate a hostage situation in which a woman threatens the life of a man she accuses of assault.

programme.desc: 5/26. Brush really enjoys her 'wonnnnderful' holiday in the forest, which makes Fox want to go on a holiday as well!

programme.title: An Là

programme.title: SPFL League 1 - Hamilton...
programme.desc: ...Academical v Inverness Caledonian Thistle. Live League One football action as Hamilton Academical host Inverness. Full coverage with commentary from Alex O'Henley.

programme.title: Òran Na Mnà
programme.desc: 1/8. A celebration of women's contribution to the Gaelic song book throughout the years, featuring singer Maggie MacInnes who devised the song-cycle 'A Woman's Song'.

programme.title: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programme.desc: 6/6. Tha na seòid a' toirt sùil air ais air reasabaidhean bhon chiad chòcaire TBh Gàidhlig. The lads go back in time to recipes from the first Gaelic TV chef.

programme.title: Dealbhan Fraoich
programme.desc: 6/8. Heather Dewar meets Lana Beaton and draws her colour portrait. Fraoch Nic an Deòir cuide ri Lana Peutan agus i dèanamh dealbh dathte dhi.

programme.title: Cuirm Aig Celtic 2026 | Oran Ur
programme.desc: 1/2. Cuirm Òran Ùr aig Celtic Connections a' comharrachadh òrain ùra Gàidhlig. Òran Ùr concert at Celtic Connections celebrating new Gaelic songs.

programme.title: Mnathan-brathaidh an Dàrna...
programme.desc: ...Cogaidh/Female Spies of WWII. 5/6. The daring stories of brave women who put their lives on the line during WWII. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Belladrum 2025 - Casey Lowery
programme.desc: 20/33. Internet sensation and talented singer-songwriter Casey Lowery at Belladrum. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Na Worlds 2022
programme.desc: 1/2. Catrìona NicNèill aig Farpaisean Chòmhlan Pìoba na Cruinne 2022 le còmhlain aig ìre a h-aon. Carrie MacNeil presents Grade 1 performances from the World Pipe Band Championships 2022.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Peataichean/Pets
programme.desc: 10/15. Eilidh Cormack meets young pet owners who show how they care for, play and interact with their pets at home. In this episode, Eilidh is joined by Orla and her pet fish.

programme.title: Orain CBeebies
programme.desc: 6/7. Òrain mu dhiofar ainmhidhean bho Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh agus sgioba CBeebies ALBA. A selection of animal songs from Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh and the CBeebies ALBA presenters.

programme.title: Creag nam Buthaidean/Puffin Rock
programme.desc: 11/21. Phoenix and Mossy find Spiky far away from his burrows. Nuair a lorgas Phoenix is Mosaidh, Spiky astar mòr bho na faichean aige, nì 'ad co-dhùnadh a thoirt dhachaigh.

programme.title: Creag nam Buthaidean/Puffin Rock
programme.desc: 12/21. Bernie takes an underground adventure while minding Baba and Lala. Tha Bernie a' gabhail dàn'-thuras fo thalamh fhad 's a tha Baba is Lala fo chùram.

programme.title: Gasta a' Ghraineag/Happy the Hoglet
programme.desc: 25/26. Tha eagal air Màgan is Fionnlagh bho rudan eagalach an-diugh. Màgan and Fionnlagh are scared of frightening things today.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: 3/104. Tha Bing 's Pando a' gabhail turas mu seach air an dreallag ach tha foighidinn a dhìth. Bing and Pando take turns on the swing, but patience proves to be a challenge.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: 4/104. Tha Bing 'son tùr a thogail le na blocaichean dathach ach tha beachd eile aig Coco... Bing wants to keep building a tower with his colourful blocks, but Coco has other ideas...

programme.title: Daolag-bhreac is Seillean/Ladybird & Bee
programme.desc: 10/26. Tha 'ad a' frithealadh bhèibidhean beaga an-diugh. They're looking after little babies today.

programme.title: Peicein/Petit
programme.desc: 1/26. Petit wants to have a pet dog, but his parents give him a boring bird which he names 'Annoying'.

programme.title: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
programme.desc: 51/52. Tha Cearban-gearraidh ag innse dhuinn mu dhèidhinn fhèin an-diugh. A Cookie Cutter Shark tells us all about himself today.

programme.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
programme.desc: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 37/52. A sweet thief has been reported in Grimsby and the suspect looks strikingly like Dave.

programme.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
programme.desc: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 38/52. Dave and Anna nurse a poorly, polluted cloud back to health and teach it how to fly again.

programme.title: Hilda

programme.title: Bogaisean is...

programme.title: Alleluia!

programme.title: Rathad Ramsay
programme.desc: 2/8. Ramsay MacMahon takes a hike in the Isle of Lewis with Gregor MacLeod. Tha Ramsay MacMahon cuir car ma chnoc air eilean Leòdhais cuide ri Griogair MacLeòid.

programme.title: Port an t-Òib
programme.desc: 6/6. Those waiting for a new house in Leverburgh will discover if they have been successful.

programme.title: Binneas - Na Trads

programme.title: Rose Reilly

programme.title: Skipinnish aig a' Chaisteal (Shorts)

programme.title: OMC!
programme.desc: Annette and Magaidh are still trying to outdo each other, CalMac are of course causing further disruption and we hear more wisdom from Gael Gal. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Emily

programme.title: Castles: Britain's Fortified History

programme.desc: Urban Hillbilly: A customer hits the roof after Seth busts him for trying to flog fake goods. Later, panic grips the staff as a farmer lets an animal loose in the shop. (S6, ep 5)

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Poachers: Les is furious to learn that dealers are poaching his customers. And things get worse when he informs a client that the bling on their diamond watch is bogus. (S6, ep 6)

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Ashley's Breakdown: Ashley splashes out on a worthless roulette table, sparking one of the biggest fights in Gold family history. (S6, ep 7)

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Ashley's Aftermath: Ashley returns to put Seth in his place. Meanwhile, a customer who has been robbed looks to sell her last remaining possession. (S6, ep 8)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: A Void At All Costs: The team make a shocking discovery that could prove that members of the 4th Michigan Cavalry returned home with millions in confederate gold. (S2, ep 3)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: The Pritchard Connection: The team are excited to find promising evidence on the 19th-century property of a Civil War general - a site where gold is rumoured to be buried. (S2, ep 4)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Southern Comfort: A century-old family secret leads Kevin and the team back to Georgia, where they discover evidence that points to more Civil War gold. (S2, ep 5)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Route Awakenings: The team attempt to investigate a sunken boxcar, but treacherous waters present a challenge for them. Also, shocking new evidence rocks the search. (S2, ep 6)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: The Plot Thickens: An alarming new theory links the theft of Confederate gold to one of the most terrible crimes to ever take place in the United States.(S2, ep 7)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Grave Expectations: The excitement is through the roof as Kevin gets his hands on gold brought home from Jefferson Davis's arrest. (S2, ep 8)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Debris Field of Dreams: Kevin and the team battle against nature as their eight-year-long quest to find a legendary boxcar at the bottom of Lake Michigan rages on. (S2, ep 9)

programme.title: The Curse Of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: It Ain't Over 'Til it's Overboard: Marty Lagina, Kevin and the team band together and pull out all the stops to finally find the Confederate gold. (S2, ep 10)

programme.title: What On Earth?
programme.desc: Explore Ragnarok and the chambers of horror, see the penguin apocalypse and attack of the mega-mice and catch a family holiday - North Korean style. (S5, ep 14)

programme.title: What On Earth?
programme.desc: Uncover an atomic tomb, witness multi-million dollar wacky races and discover the country on fire. (S5, ep 15)

programme.title: What On Earth?
programme.desc: Find the billion-dollar horde buried deep beneath the deserts of Utah, discover the massacre so horrific it was captured from space and see the ice cave of the Norse fire God. (S5, ep 16)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The Holy Grail: What is the Holy Grail? Coveted by everyone from Roman Emperors to Adolf Hitler, this sacred object is said to hold incredible powers. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Malaysia Flight 370: In one of the most chilling modern day mysteries, a plane carrying hundreds vanishes over the ocean. Nearly a decade later, there are still no answers. (S3, ep 7)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The Sodder Children Disappearance: On Christmas morning 1945, five siblings vanish from their family home in West Virginia as a fire blazes. What happened is still a mystery. (S3, ep 8)

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Mysterious Sacred Structures: The history and perplexing mysteries behind some of the world's most sacred and holy relics. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: New: Clash Of Ancient Warriors
programme.desc: Battle of Agincourt: In 1415, the finest French chivalry met at Azincourt. Exhausted and outnumbered, the army of King Henry V of England was easy prey - but it all went wrong. (S2, ep 3)

programme.title: The UnXplained...
programme.desc: Strange Technology: There are many puzzling artefacts from around the world, challenging everything known about the technological capabilities of distant ancestors. (S4, ep 6)

programme.title: The UnXplained...
programme.desc: Unbreakable Codes: For centuries, mankind has devised ingenious ways to hide information, from enigmatic puzzles to secret symbols. Can we unlock these great mysteries? (S4, ep 7)

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: The Jericho Head, the Cloudbuster and the Map: Examine a 9,000-year-old clay head, a 1950s machine built to control the weather and a map which could be the oldest ever found. (S2, ep 7)

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: Texas' Roswell: In April 1897, an unidentified craft crashed in Texas. Locals claimed they buried the spaceship and its alien pilot. Can a new search uncover the remains? (S1, ep 12)

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: Unidentified submerged objects have allegedly been sighted since the days of Christopher Columbus. Can scientists uncover evidence of USOs?

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: Alien Engineering (Part 1 of 2): What would happen if a UFO did land on Earth and humans found it? Engineers create a 'spaceship' to see how alien technology could work. (S1, ep 14)

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: Alien Engineering (Part 2 of 2): Laser weapons and tele-transporters would probably all be fitted to an alien spaceship, but what if they could be used by humans too? (S1, ep 15)

programme.title: Container Wars
programme.desc: Shark Attack: Mo and Ty, AKA 'Team Muscle', make their move and go on the attack. (S1, ep 8)

programme.title: Container Wars
programme.desc: Big Guns: A mysterious container from Guam has the competition ready for battle. Manic Matt fires a warning shot, but the Israelis aren't backing down. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike M.I.A: Mike works at remote locations for his rock scaling business, while trying to manage the shop's restoration of a 1969 Road Runner convertible from afar. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time they head to Dorset to meet Tim, the owner of a delectable collection of trinkets. (S3, ep 7)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time, they head for Mark's shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets. (S3, ep 8)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: The vintage restorers continue to challenge themselves to make money out of other people's automotive junk and classic collectables. (S4, ep 2)

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Citroen 2CV: The guys are looking for any French car that is not a 2CV - but once they come across this one, it's impossible to turn down. (S3, ep 3)

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Sweet Carolina: Rick, Corey and Chum bring their road trip to an end in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, and come across antique tractors, test fire weapons and a NASCAR legend. (S1, ep 8)

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick's Big Shot: A seller comes in with an overcoat once owned by Lee Harvey Oswald, Corey checks out a 30-year-old Gibson guitar and Rick and Corey check out a WWII half-track.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Gangs Of New York: Ton and Allen take on a local thrift store gang in Brooklyn. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon. (S3, ep 14)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The Jersey Score: Ton and Allen are made to feel unwelcome at a silent auction in New Jersey. They uncover a vintage vehicle and a skeet throwing machine from the 1960s. (S3, ep 15)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Bowling Pin Payday: Allen and Ton go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They find a 19th century rifle and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the 1960s. (S3, ep 16)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen's Got Balls: After returning to LA, Ton and Allen butt heads with a familiar old foe. They also discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle. (S3, ep 17)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Locktoberfest: Darrell and Brandon have high hopes as they return to the site of their biggest score. The others bid to take down the self-proclaimed "King of Montebello". (S7, ep 12)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: My Little Brony: The action shifts to Oceanside, where Rene plans to make the others pay for crashing his home turf. Darrell and Brandon fight for a piece of film history. (S7, ep 13)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Up The Ante In El Monte: Big lockers mean big money in El Monte where Brandi and Jarrod try to play the other buyers. But what happens if their scheme backfires? (S7, ep 14)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: All Along The Swatchtower: Jarrod's antics push Brandi to her limits as the auctions move to Koreatown. With highend merchandise up for grabs, Dave intends to score big. (S7, ep 15)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A San Marcos Mitzvah: The auction action moves to Darrell and Brandon's home turf, where Mary comes up with her own way to deal with inflated prices. (S7, ep 16)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: North Hollywood Hustle: Even Dan and Laura fail to escape the fierce competition at locker auctions in North Hollywood. (S7, ep 17)

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben visits Bette in the wilds of northern Queensland, where she's been dealing with snakes, floods and isolation since moving to the harsh Australian wilderness 30 years ago.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben spends time with DNA, a homeless artist who's built a home from scrap on a desert hill in Slab City, California - an alternative lifestyle community.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Master dog trainer Graeme Hall helps a Hungarian Vizsla with no respect for the rules, and Denver, a Bearded Collie who is a football hooligan obsessed with breaking everybody's balls.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: The family battle through two brutal winter storms. While they fight the elements to feed the flock, mum Amanda is powerless to stop the only livestock trailer being washed down.

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Completely cut off from the outside world, this remarkable episode reveals life on the farm during lockdown. Amanda and the kids film themselves as they deal with the lambing season.

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm

programme.desc: We delve into a turbulent history to ask why every monarch is expected to produce at least two offspring - preferably male. Plus, the curious custom of royal warrants.

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Los Angeles. Buyers bid on seized items and property at a police auction in Los Angeles. Billy and the Martins compete to win antique weapons, and Mark gambles on gold. S1, Ep6

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: What a Dummy. The Baggage Battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California. There are plenty of valuable items to choose from, including a vintage slot machine. S3, Ep2

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Lady Luck. The baggage battlers head to an esteemed estate sale in St. Paul, where they bid on items ranging from automotive parts and a rare doll to a hockey mascot costume. S3, Ep3

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Blow Up. The baggage battlers head to an unclaimed crate auction Tucson, Arizona and things really heat up when one of the experts tests a vintage bomb detonator. S3, Ep4

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Mike Tyson's Punch Out. The baggage battlers head to an estate auction in Jacksonville, Florida, where pop culture collectibles and sealed boxes are amongst the items on offer. S3, Ep5

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Space Case. The baggage battlers head to a government auction in Sacramento, California. Mark Meyer cuts into the Martin's profit by bidding high on a box of knives. S3, Ep6

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Two-Faced. The baggage battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California, where one of the auction specialists discover a mask mould of a famous Hollywood icon. S3, Ep7

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: Guns a-Blazin'. The baggage battlers head to a cowboy auction in California, where they duel over items dating back to the legendary Buffalo Bill and the Barnum & Bailey circuses. S3, Ep8

programme.title: Baggage Battles

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: No Replacement For Displacement. Wayne buys the ultimate dream car: an all-original 1955 Mercedes 300 SL 'Gullwing' that's been hidden from the public eye for decades. S11, Ep3

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: (AC) Ace In The Hole. Wayne is in Virginia to help sell an impeccable 1958 AC Ace Bristol roadster. In California, a 1968 Toyota Corona makes an unforgettable impression. S11, Ep4

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: 3 Million Mile Volvo. Wayne lifts the lid on a Volvo that holds the world record for the highest mileage. Plus, he reverse engineers a gearless transmission for a 1912 Cartercar. S11, Ep5

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: (2011) Andrea Arnold's radical adaptation of Emily Brontë's classic novel of obsessive love, anger and revenge on the weather-beaten Yorkshire moors. With Kaya Scodelario and James Howson.

programme.title: Smoke Sauna Sisterhood
programme.desc: (2023) Anna Hints's award-winning and insightful documentary centres around a group of women taking traditional smoke saunas over a period of time, in the depths of an Estonian forest.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: The Comancheros
programme.desc: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: (2022) Margot Robbie and Brad Pitt star in Damien Chazelle's opulently decadent, satirical look at Hollywood in the 1920s as it teeters between the silent the era and the 'talkies'.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: (2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
programme.desc: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

programme.title: One Day
programme.desc: (2011) Romantic drama. Jim Sturgess and Anne Hathaway star as friends whose lives intertwine and diverge over the years, after first meeting as graduates in 1988.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: (2022) Adults only horror with Daisy Edgar-Jones. When date-weary Noa meets a guy in a supermarket, she thinks things are looking up. But he's oddly obsessed with not eating animals...

programme.title: A Banquet
programme.desc: (2021) Tense body-horror with Sienna Guillory. A teenage girl suddenly stops eating, but stays the same weight... Could she be a monster from Japanese folklore who has a hidden extra mouth?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Think Like a Dog
programme.desc: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: (2020) Action-comedy starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence. Just when Marcus is planning to retire, a vengeful drug lord's son shoots Mike. Can our dynamic duo beat the cartel?

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: (2011) Andrea Arnold's radical adaptation of Emily Brontë's classic novel of obsessive love, anger and revenge on the weather-beaten Yorkshire moors. With Kaya Scodelario and James Howson.

programme.title: Smoke Sauna Sisterhood
programme.desc: (2023) Anna Hints's award-winning and insightful documentary centres around a group of women taking traditional smoke saunas over a period of time, in the depths of an Estonian forest.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: The Comancheros
programme.desc: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: (2022) Margot Robbie and Brad Pitt star in Damien Chazelle's opulently decadent, satirical look at Hollywood in the 1920s as it teeters between the silent the era and the 'talkies'.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: (2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
programme.desc: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

programme.title: One Day
programme.desc: (2011) Romantic drama. Jim Sturgess and Anne Hathaway star as friends whose lives intertwine and diverge over the years, after first meeting as graduates in 1988.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: (2022) Adults only horror with Daisy Edgar-Jones. When date-weary Noa meets a guy in a supermarket, she thinks things are looking up. But he's oddly obsessed with not eating animals...

programme.title: A Banquet
programme.desc: (2021) Tense body-horror with Sienna Guillory. A teenage girl suddenly stops eating, but stays the same weight... Could she be a monster from Japanese folklore who has a hidden extra mouth?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Think Like a Dog
programme.desc: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.
